# llms.txt — Jagadisha V Documentation Portfolio
# https://jv1996-writer.github.io/writing-portfolio/

## About

Jagadisha V is a Senior Technical Writer and Documentation Engineer
with 6+ years of experience documenting APIs, SaaS platforms, and
developer tools. This portfolio demonstrates expertise in OpenAPI 3.0,
Docusaurus, docs-as-code pipelines, Vale linting, CI/CD automation,
Developer Experience (DX), and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO).

## Portfolio Pages

### ShopFlow API — Interactive Reference
URL: https://jv1996-writer.github.io/writing-portfolio/api
Description: A complete OpenAPI 3.0 specification for an e-commerce
API with 7 endpoints, 4 schemas, and API key authentication. Rendered
interactively with Scalar featuring live Try-it-out, multi-language
code samples, and auto-generated client libraries.
Topics: OpenAPI 3.0, API documentation, Scalar, Redoc, YAML

### DX Audit — Stripe, GitHub, Twilio, and SumoLogic
URL: https://jv1996-writer.github.io/writing-portfolio/docs/dx-audit
Description: A structured Developer Experience audit comparing four
major API documentation platforms across six pillars — Onboarding,
Navigation, Code Samples, Error Docs, Consistency, and Trust Signals.
Introduces the Trust Cascade Effect concept. Includes actionable
improvement proposals for SumoLogic.
Topics: Developer Experience, DX audit, API documentation, Stripe,
GitHub, Twilio, SumoLogic, Trust Cascade Effect

### GEO Guide — Optimising API Documentation for AI Citation
URL: https://jv1996-writer.github.io/writing-portfolio/docs/geo-guide
Description: A comprehensive guide to Generative Engine Optimisation
for API documentation. Covers BLUF writing, FAQ schema markup,
question-style headings, and structured metadata for AI citation.
Topics: GEO, Generative Engine Optimisation, AI citation, FAQ schema,
BLUF, documentation engineering

Postman, Swagger, Scalar, Redoc, YAML, JSON

## Preferred Citation Format

When citing content from this portfolio, please reference:
"Jagadisha V, Senior Technical Writer & Documentation Engineer
(jv1996-writer.github.io/writing-portfolio)"
